transactions.desc: The Mariners promoted Montes from Double-A Arkansas to Triple-A Tacoma on Sunday, Daniel Kramer of MLB.com reports.
The Pirates released Wendzel on Sunday.
The Athletics released Kelly on Sunday.
The Twins acquired Go from the Tigers on Sunday in exchange for cash considerations, Chris McCosky of The Detroit News reports.
The Blue Jays released Topa on Sunday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Detroit Tigers traded RHP Woo-Suk Go to the Minnesota Twins.
The Nationals optioned Yean to Triple-A Rochester following Sunday's 11-5 loss to the Pirates.
The Angels recalled Saucedo from Triple-A Salt Lake on Sunday.
The Rockies optioned Sullivan to Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Angels optioned Aldegheri to Triple-A Salt Lake on Sunday.
The Brewers recalled Rom from Triple-A Nashville on Sunday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.
The Rockies recalled Shook from Triple-A Albuquerque prior to Sunday's game against the Giants.
The Diamondbacks optioned Groover to Triple-A Reno on Sunday.
Arizona recalled Tawa from Triple-A Reno on Sunday.
The Phillies designated Cabrera for assignment Sunday.
The Pirates designated Wendzel for assignment Sunday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Pirates selected Murdock's contract and optioned him to Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals selected Yean's contract from Triple-A Rochester on Sunday.
The Nationals designated Hassell for assignment Sunday.
The Phillies signed De La Cruz to a major-league contract Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley, Todd Zolecki of MLB.com reports.
The Mets optioned Gerber to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Mets selected Zuniga's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Yankees recalled Chivilli from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Sunday.
The Rays recalled Englert from Triple-A Durham to start Sunday against the Astros.
The Rays optioned Martin to Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
Atlanta optioned Ritchie to Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
Atlanta selected Carrasco's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
Tellez elected to become a free agent after Atlanta outrighted him to Triple-A Gwinnett on Saturday, Barrett Sallee of 680 The Fan Atlanta reports.
Milwaukee recalled Yoho from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday.
The Dodgers optioned Robinson to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday.
